data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the presence of 'Speaker/presenter schedule links', which is a specific requirement outlined in the linked use case. However, there is no evidence provided that directly addresses this requirement, indicating a clear gap. The prior steps focus on bookings and offers but do not include any checks or validations related to speaker schedules, which confirms that this requirement is not satisfied.
gaps: No evidence of speaker/presenter schedule links.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Implement speaker/presenter schedule link validation
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Verify that speaker/presenter schedule links are correctly generated and accessible.
